all_scraped_posts.content:
✈️ Now Hiring: Cloud Architect (Azure) – Contract

📄 12‑month contract
📍 Hybrid – 3 days onsite 
We’re looking for an Azure Cloud Architect to help evolve and optimize cloud platform in a large‑scale, highly regulated environment.
Top Skills We’re Seeking:
✅ 5+ years Cloud Architecture experience with Microsoft Azure (enterprise scale preferred)
✅ DevOps & CI/CD expertise (Azure DevOps, GitHub Actions, Terraform, Kubernetes)
✅ Strong foundation across infrastructure, software, and data
✅ Bonus: Data engineering & AI/ML platform exposure (ADF, Synapse, Databricks, AI enablement)
You’ll Be Responsible For:
• Optimizing Azure architecture for performance, scale, security & cost
• Designing and improving CI/CD and DevOps practices
• Supporting AI enablement initiatives and cloud modernization
• Providing technical leadership, guidance, and documentation
If you enjoy architecting enterprise cloud platforms, driving modernization, and enabling teams through strong design and DevOps practices, let’s talk.
👉 DM me or comment below to connect

🚀 We're hiring a Chief Agentic Systems Architect (remote) — a rare, career-defining role for someone ready to shape how autonomous AI systems write, refactor, and govern production code at scale.

This isn't a theoretical AI role. You'll be hands-on — decomposing legacy monoliths, building MCP servers, and designing the cognitive context layers that let LLMs safely ship production code with minimal human intervention.

What you'll own:
→ Modernizing large-scale legacy systems using the Strangler Pattern
→ Architecting agent context layers (Skills, Rules, Commands)
→ Building & operating Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers
→ Contract-first API design as the bridge between human intent and autonomous execution
→ Gatekeeper for AI-generated PRs — scalability, security, maintainability

What we're looking for:
→ 15+ years in software architecture or technical leadership
→ Deep expertise in TypeScript, .NET, Node.js
→ Proven experience with agentic development, LLM tooling, and AI-assisted engineering
→ SOLID, Hexagonal Architecture, DI, TDD — not buzzwords, but daily practice
→ Bias toward clean, deterministic, production-grade systems

Bonus if you've navigated SaaS transformations, scale-ups, or PE-backed environments — and thrive in high-ownership, high-ambiguity settings.

Fully remote. Global timezone. High trust, high impact.

Interested or know someone who'd be a great fit? Send an email to recruiting.chinky@gmail.com or DM 👇

#AIEngineering #AgenticSystems #MCP #SoftwareArchitecture #LLM #RemoteWork #Hiring #TechJobs

Anil Diddela
anil.d@echoitsol.com

W2 Only | Celonis (must have)
🚀 Hiring: Celonis Data Modeler (Remote – EST Preferred)
📅 Duration: 6+ Month Contract
🎯 Experience: 9–11 Years
🎥 Interview: Video

📌 Manager References: 2 Required

We’re looking for a Celonis Data Modeler to support KYC initiatives and build process mining solutions.

🔹 Key Skills:
• Celonis data modeling & process mining
• KPI, dashboards & action flows
• SQL & data analysis
• KYC / Compliance / Financial services
• Data pipelines & performance optimization
• AI/analytics exposure (nice to have)

Please share your resume to Bishu.kumar@cognowiz.com


#Hiring #Celonis #ProcessMining #DataModeler #KYC #RemoteJobs

🚀 **Hiring: Sr. Agentic Software Engineer (AI)**

We’re actively looking for a **Senior Agentic Software Engineer** to join an exciting and fast-growing team working on cutting-edge **Agentic AI systems** that power real business workflows.

📍 **Location:** Charlotte, NC (3–4 days onsite)
⏳ **Duration:** 5+ Months (Contract to Hire)

---

💡 **What makes this role unique?**
This is not about basic prompt engineering or AI demos. We need **strong engineers** who can build **production-grade AI agents** end-to-end — from architecture to deployment and scaling.

The hiring manager is focused on:
✔️ Strong **foundational coding skills** (Go, Python, TypeScript)
✔️ Solid understanding of **AI/LLM concepts**
✔️ Engineers who can **think, design, and build**, not just rely on AI tools

---

🧠 **What you’ll work on:**
• Designing intelligent **agentic systems** with planning, memory & tool usage
• Building with frameworks like **LangChain, LangGraph, Semantic Kernel, AutoGen**
• Implementing **RAG & MCP-based integrations**
• Working on **Kubernetes, CI/CD, DevOps, and infrastructure automation**
• Creating scalable, secure, and observable AI systems

---

🔍 **What we’re looking for:**
• 5+ years of strong **software engineering experience**
• Hands-on with **LLM-based applications (beyond prototypes)**
• Experience with **backend systems, APIs, and production environments**
• Passion for building **real-world AI solutions**

---

⚡ If you’re a strong engineer with AI exposure (you don’t need 10 years in Agentic AI!), this could be a great opportunity to step into the future of software development.

📩 **Interested or know someone who fits?**
Feel free to reach out or share your profile at mukul@brightmindsol.com.

#Hiring #AI #AgenticAI #SoftwareEngineer #Python #Golang #DevOps #Kubernetes #LLM #TechJobs #CharlotteJobs

🚀 Hiring Platform Engineers (Contract | Multi‑Extension)
📍 Downtown Vancouver | 4 days onsite
We’re growing our platform team and looking for Platform Engineers with an automation mindset and strong cloud fundamentals.
Must‑Have Skills:
✅ 3–5 years Platform Engineering experience (AWS + Azure, AWS preferred)
✅ Strong dev background – Terraform reusable modules & automation
✅ Experience using AI platforms (code verification, AI project integrations)

You’ll Work On:
• AWS/Azure landing zones & IaC
• CI/CD with GitLab
• Secure, scalable cloud platforms
• AI/agent integrations, observability & reliability

📄 Contract role | Multiple extensions
💬 DM me or comment to connect!

🚀 We’re Hiring: Generative AI Lead Engineer 
📍 Location: Toronto, ON & Calgary, AB
⏳ Job Type: Contract

Must-Have Requirements
·                    8+ years of experience in software, platform, or cloud engineering.
·                    3+ years of hands-on experience with AI/ML or Generative AI solutions.
·                    Strong experience with Azure OpenAI and LLM-based application development.
·                    Proven experience implementing RAG architectures and vector search solutions.
·                    Experience delivering end-to-end AI applications, including backend services, APIs, and basic user interfaces for AI-driven solutions.
·                    Experience using AI agents or agentic workflows to assist with software development, automation, or intelligent orchestration.
·                    Solid background in Azure cloud services (Functions, App Services, ACR).
·                    Familiarity with AI observability, including model monitoring, logging, and usage analytics.
·                    Hands-on experience with Azure AI Search, Azure Document Intelligence, or similar services.
·                    Strong programming experience in Python and or NodeJS/TypeScript.
·                    Experience with prompt engineering, evaluation strategies, and LLM performance tuning.
·                    Experience designing scalable, resilient, and secure enterprise systems.
·                    Excellent communication skills with the ability to translate business needs into technical solutions.

📩 Interested candidates can share their resume at
pooja.s@tekishub.com

Thanks & Regards
Pooja Sehrawat

🚀 We’re Hiring: Head of Estimation (BIM, Digital Construction & Digital Twin)

Are you a seasoned commercial leader with a passion for driving winning bids and shaping global project strategies? This is your opportunity to lead a high impact function with a global industry leader.

📍 Location: Bangalore
💼 Experience: 15-20 years
🎓 Qualification: B.E./B.Tech (Civil/Mechanical/Electrical/Construction) | MBA / PG in Construction Management preferred

Role Overview: As the Head of Estimation, you will lead the end to end estimation and proposal function across global projects. This is a strategic leadership role with full ownership of pricing strategy, margin accountability, governance, and digital transformation of estimation practices.

💡 Key Responsibilities
✔️ Drive estimation strategy and commercial leadership for global BIM & digital construction projects
✔️ Own bid governance, pricing approvals, and margin thresholds
✔️ Lead proposal submissions, client negotiations, and deal structuring
✔️ Establish standardized estimation frameworks, tools, and governance models
✔️ Ensure margin realization through post-award tracking and analysis
✔️ Champion AI, automation, and data-driven estimation practices
✔️ Identify and mitigate commercial and contractual risks
✔️ Build and lead high-performing, multi-location estimation teams
✔️ Collaborate with global business and delivery leaders

✅ What We’re Looking For
🔹 15+ years in estimation / commercial / pre-contract roles
🔹 Strong expertise in BIM led delivery and digital construction
🔹 Proven leadership in pricing strategy, negotiations, and deal closures
🔹 Exposure to AI, automation, and digital estimation tools
🔹 Excellent stakeholder management and communication skills

 Why Join US?
🔹 Strategic leadership role with global visibility
🔹 Opportunity to build and scale a digitally enabled estimation function
🔹 Work closely with senior leadership and international clients
🔹 Be at the forefront of digital construction innovation

📩 Interested candidates can share their profiles at: nadeem.iqbal@acehunt.in

If you want to stay up to date with us, follow our Page AceHunt Consulting

#Hiring #Estimation #BIM #DigitalConstruction #DigitalTwin #LeadershipHiring #ConstructionJobs #EngineeringCareers #CommercialLeadership #AI #Automation #GlobalCareers #HiringNow
